tasks.description: Add task-type routing logic to orchestrator
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add taskTypeRouter function that routes documentation/ADR/planning tasks to Claude agent and code/test/bugfix tasks to MiniMax. Use task.type field to determine routing. Return agent name string.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator-config.ts, add TEST_RUNNER agent config with role to validate code changes before supervisor review. Include pre-validation capabilities: syntax check, import verification, basic type consistency. Set priority between execution and supervisor.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add dependencyDecomposer function that detects multi-file or cascading dependencies. When task has dependencies array length > 1, split into atomic single-dependency subtasks. Prevents cascade failures by isolating failure domains.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add preValidationStep that routes completed tasks through TEST_RUNNER agent before supervisor. Only tasks with clean validation proceed to supervisor. Failed validation returns to execution agent with error context. Reduces supervisor rejection rate.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts, add trackCascadeMetrics function that logs dependency chain length, failure propagation depth, and skip reasons. Emit metrics when tasks skip due to dependency failure. Enables monitoring of decomposition effectiveness.
